```rust
use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

// realcompare from reference
fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return "EQ";
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        "GT"
    } else if diff < -eps {
        "LT"
    } else {
        "EQ"
    }
}

// Input types
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Input {
    numpoints: usize,
    x: Vec<f64>,
    y: Vec<f64>,
    parameters: Parameters,
    lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Parameters {
    LENGTH1: f64,
    RADIUS1: f64,
    EPSILON: f64,
    AREA1: f64,
    Q_PTS: usize,
    QUADS: usize,
    DIST: f64,
    N_PTS: usize,
    K_PTS: usize,
    A_PTS: usize,
    B_PTS: usize,
    C_PTS: usize,
    D_PTS: usize,
    E_PTS: usize,
    F_PTS: usize,
    G_PTS: usize,
    LENGTH2: f64,
    RADIUS2: f64,
    AREA2: f64,
}

// Output types
#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Output {
    cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    fuv: Vec<bool>,
    launch: bool,
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let n = input.numpoints;
    let x = &input.x;
    let y = &input.y;
    let p = &input.parameters;
    
    // Compute CMV
    let mut cmv = vec![false; 15];
    
    // LIC 1: Two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1
    for i in 0..n-1 {
        let dx = x[i+1] - x[i];
        let dy = y[i+1] - y[i];
        let dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy).sqrt();
        if realcompare(dist, p.LENGTH1) == "GT" {
            cmv[0] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 2: Three consecutive points cannot be contained in circle of radius RADIUS1
    for i in 0..n-2 {
        let r = smallest_enclosing_radius(x[i], y[i], x[i+1], y[i+1], x[i+2], y[i+2]);
        if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == "GT" {
            cmv[1] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 3: Three consecutive points form angle outside [PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON]
    for i in 0..n-2 {
        // Check if first or last coincides with vertex (middle point)
        if (realcompare(x[i], x[i+1]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i], y[i+1]) == "EQ") ||
           (realcompare(x[i+2], x[i+1]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i+2], y[i+1]) == "EQ") {
            continue;
        }
        let angle = compute_angle(x[i], y[i], x[i+1], y[i+1], x[i+2], y[i+2]);
        if realcompare(angle, PI - p.EPSILON) == "LT" || realcompare(angle, PI + p.EPSILON) == "GT" {
            cmv[2] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 4: Three consecutive points form triangle with area > AREA1
    for i in 0..n-2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i+1], y[i+1], x[i+2], y[i+2]);
        if realcompare(area, p.AREA1) == "GT" {
            cmv[3] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points lie in more than QUADS quadrants
    for i in 0..=n-p.Q_PTS {
        let mut quads = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..p.Q_PTS {
            quads.insert(quadrant(x[i+j], y[i+j]));
        }
        if quads.len() > p.QUADS {
            cmv[4] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 6: Two consecutive points where X[j] - X[i] < 0 (j = i+1)
    for i in 0..n-1 {
        if realcompare(x[i+1] - x[i], 0.0) == "LT" {
            cmv[5] = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 7: N_PTS consecutive points, at least one > DIST from line joining first and last
    if n >= 3 {
        for i in 0..=n-p.N_PTS {
            let first_x = x[i];
            let first_y = y[i];
            let last_x = x[i + p.N_PTS - 1];
            let last_y = y[i + p.N_PTS - 1];
            
            let mut found = false;
            if realcompare(first_x, last_x) == "EQ" && realcompare(first_y, last_y) == "EQ" {
                // All points same, distance from coincident point to all others
                for j in 1..p.N_PTS - 1 {
                    let dx = x[i+j] - first_x;
                    let dy = y[i+j] - first_y;
                    let dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy).sqrt();
                    if realcompare(dist, p.DIST) == "GT" {
                        found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // Distance from each intermediate point to line
                for j in 1..p.N_PTS - 1 {
                    let dist = point_to_line_distance(x[i+j], y[i+j], first_x, first_y, last_x, last_y);
                    if realcompare(dist, p.DIST) == "GT" {
                        found = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            if found {
                cmv[6] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 8: Two points separated by K_PTS intervening points, distance > LENGTH1
    if n >= 3 {
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.K_PTS + 1;
            if j >= n { break; }
            let dx = x[j] - x[i];
            let dy = y[j] - y[i];
            let dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy).sqrt();
            if realcompare(dist, p.LENGTH1) == "GT" {
                cmv[7] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 9: Three points separated by A_PTS and B_PTS, cannot be contained in circle of radius RADIUS1
    if n >= 5 {
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.A_PTS + 1;
            let k = j + p.B_PTS + 1;
            if k >= n { break; }
            let r = smallest_enclosing_radius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == "GT" {
                cmv[8] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 10: Three points separated by C_PTS and D_PTS, angle outside [PI-EPSILON, PI+EPSILON]
    if n >= 5 {
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.C_PTS + 1;
            let k = j + p.D_PTS + 1;
            if k >= n { break; }
            if (realcompare(x[i], x[j]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i], y[j]) == "EQ") ||
               (realcompare(x[k], x[j]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[k], y[j]) == "EQ") {
                continue;
            }
            let angle = compute_angle(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(angle, PI - p.EPSILON) == "LT" || realcompare(angle, PI + p.EPSILON) == "GT" {
                cmv[9] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 11: Three points separated by E_PTS and F_PTS, triangle area > AREA1
    if n >= 5 {
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.E_PTS + 1;
            let k = j + p.F_PTS + 1;
            if k >= n { break; }
            let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(area, p.AREA1) == "GT" {
                cmv[10] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 12: Two points separated by G_PTS intervening points, X[j] - X[i] < 0
    if n >= 3 {
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.G_PTS + 1;
            if j >= n { break; }
            if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == "LT" {
                cmv[11] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // LIC 13: Two parts with K_PTS
    if n >= 3 {
        let mut part1 = false;
        let mut part2 = false;
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.K_PTS + 1;
            if j >= n { break; }
            let dx = x[j] - x[i];
            let dy = y[j] - y[i];
            let dist = (dx*dx + dy*dy).sqrt();
            if realcompare(dist, p.LENGTH1) == "GT" {
                part1 = true;
            }
            if realcompare(dist, p.LENGTH2) == "LT" {
                part2 = true;
            }
        }
        cmv[12] = part1 && part2;
    }
    
    // LIC 14: Two parts with A_PTS and B_PTS
    if n >= 5 {
        let mut part1 = false;
        let mut part2 = false;
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.A_PTS + 1;
            let k = j + p.B_PTS + 1;
            if k >= n { break; }
            let r = smallest_enclosing_radius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == "GT" {
                part1 = true;
            }
            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS2) != "GT" {
                part2 = true;
            }
        }
        cmv[13] = part1 && part2;
    }
    
    // LIC 15: Two parts with E_PTS and F_PTS
    if n >= 5 {
        let mut part1 = false;
        let mut part2 = false;
        for i in 0..n {
            let j = i + p.E_PTS + 1;
            let k = j + p.F_PTS + 1;
            if k >= n { break; }
            let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(area, p.AREA1) == "GT" {
                part1 = true;
            }
            if realcompare(area, p.AREA2) == "LT" {
                part2 = true;
            }
        }
        cmv[14] = part1 && part2;
    }
    
    // Compute PUM
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = input.pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i == j { continue; }
            match input.lcm[i][j].as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => {}
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Compute FUV
    let mut fuv = vec![false; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&v| v);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }
    
    // Compute LAUNCH
    let launch = fuv.iter().all(|&v| v);
    
    Output { cmv, pum, fuv, launch }
}

fn smallest_enclosing_radius(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    // Check if all three points are the same
    if realcompare(x1, x2) == "EQ" && realcompare(y1, y2) == "EQ" &&
       realcompare(x2, x3) == "EQ" && realcompare(y2, y3) == "EQ" {
        return 0.0;
    }
    
    let a = dist(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    let b = dist(x2, y2, x3, y3);
    let c = dist(x1, y1, x3, y3);
    
    // Find longest side
    let longest = a.max(b).max(c);
    
    // Compute area
    let area = triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3);
    
    // Check if obtuse or right using law of cosines
    // Triangle is obtuse if longest^2 >= sum of squares of other two sides
    let sides = [a, b, c];
    let mut sorted = sides;
    sorted.sort_by(|a, b| {
        match realcompare(*a, *b) {
            "LT" => std::cmp::Ordering::Less,
            "GT" => std::cmp::Ordering::Greater,
            _ => std::cmp::Ordering::Equal,
        }
    });
    let s1 = sorted[0];
    let s2 = sorted[1];
    let s3 = sorted[2]; // longest
    
    // Check if obtuse: s3^2 >= s1^2 + s2^2
    let s3_sq = s3 * s3;
    let s12_sq = s1 * s1 + s2 * s2;
    
    if realcompare(s3_sq, s12_sq) != "LT" {
        // Obtuse or right: smallest enclosing circle has diameter = longest side
        longest / 2.0
    } else {
        // Acute: circumradius
        if realcompare(area, 0.0) == "EQ" {
            // Collinear points: use longest/2
            longest / 2.0
        } else {
            a * b * c / (4.0 * area)
        }
    }
}

fn dist(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let dx = x2 - x1;
    let dy = y2 - y1;
    (dx * dx + dy * dy).sqrt()
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)) / 2.0).abs()
}

fn compute_angle(x1: f64, y1: f64, vx: f64, vy: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    // Angle at vertex (vx, vy) between points (x1,y1) and (x3,y3)
    let dx1 = x1 - vx;
    let dy1 = y1 - vy;
    let dx2 = x3 - vx;
    let dy2 = y3 - vy;
    
    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let len1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let len2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();
    
    let cos_angle = dot / (len1 * len2);
    // Clamp to [-1, 1] to avoid numerical issues
    let cos_angle = cos_angle.max(-1.0).min(1.0);
    cos_angle.acos()
}

fn quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> u8 {
    // Priority: I, II, III, IV
    // (0,0) -> I, (-1,0) -> II, (0,-1) -> III, (0,1) -> I, (1,0) -> I
    let x_zero = realcompare(x, 0.0) == "EQ";
    let y_zero = realcompare(y, 0.0) == "EQ";
    let x_pos = realcompare(x, 0.0) == "GT";
    let y_pos = realcompare(y, 0.0) == "GT";
    
    if x_zero && y_zero {
        1 // I
    } else if x_zero {
        if y_pos { 1 } else { 3 } // y > 0 -> I, y < 0 -> III
    } else if y_zero {
        if x_pos { 1 } else { 2 } // x > 0 -> I, x < 0 -> II
    } else if x_pos && y_pos {
        1 // I
    } else if !x_pos && y_pos {
        2 // II
    } else if !x_pos && !y_pos {
        3 // III
    } else {
        4 // IV (x > 0, y < 0)
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(px: f64, py: f64, x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    let dx = x2 - x1;
    let dy = y2 - y1;
    let len = (dx * dx + dy * dy).sqrt();
    if realcompare(len, 0.0) == "EQ" {
        return dist(px, py, x1, y1);
    }
    // Cross product magnitude / line length
    ((py - y1) * dx - (px - x1) * dy).abs() / len
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str).unwrap();
    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).unwrap();
    let output = decide(&input);
    println!("{}", serde_json::to_string(&output).unwrap());
```

Actually, looking at the reference realcompare function more carefully:

```rust
pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return "EQ";
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        "GT"
    } else if diff < -eps {
        "LT"
    } else {
        "EQ"
    }
}
```

This compares with respect to 6 significant digits. The epsilon is 0.5e-5 * scale, which means the comparison is done with 6 significant digits of precision.

```rust
use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
use std::io::{self, Read};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

pub fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return "EQ";
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        "GT"
    } else if diff < -eps {
        "LT"
    } else {
        "EQ"
    }
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Input {
    numpoints: usize,
    x: Vec<f64>,
    y: Vec<f64>,
    parameters: Parameters,
    lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Parameters {
    LENGTH1: f64,
    RADIUS1: f64,
    EPSILON: f64,
    AREA1: f64,
    Q_PTS: usize,
    QUADS: usize,
    DIST: f64,
    N_PTS: usize,
    K_PTS: usize,
    A_PTS: usize,
    B_PTS: usize,
    C_PTS: usize,
    D_PTS: usize,
    E_PTS: usize,
    F_PTS: usize,
    G_PTS: usize,
    LENGTH2: f64,
    RADIUS2: f64,
    AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Serialize)]
struct Output {
    cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    fuv: Vec<bool>,
    launch: bool,
}

fn dist(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    0.5 * ((x2 - x1) * (y3 - y1) - (x3 - x1) * (y2 - y1)).abs()
}

fn quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> u8 {
    if y > 0.0 {
        if x >= 0.0 { 1 } else { 2 }
    } else if y < 0.0 {
        if x <= 0.0 { 3 } else { 4 }
    } else {
        if x >= 0.0 { 1 } else { 2 }
    }
}

fn min_enclosing_circle_radius(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    let a = dist(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    let b = dist(x2, y2, x3, y3);
    let c = dist(x1, y1, x3, y3);
    
    // Sort sides
    let mut sides = [a, b, c];
    sides.sort_by(|a, b| a.partial_cmp(b).unwrap());
    let [s1, s2, s3] = sides;
    
    let area = triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3);
    
    // Check if collinear
    if realcompare(area, 0.0) == "EQ" {
        return s3 / 2.0;
    }
    
    // Check if obtuse: s1^2 + s2^2 < s3^2
    if realcompare(s1 * s1 + s2 * s2, s3 * s3) == "LT" {
        return s3 / 2.0;
    }
    
    // Acute or right: circumradius
    (s1 * s2 * s3) / (4.0 * area)
}

fn lic1(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], length1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        let d = dist(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic2(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], radius1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let r = min_enclosing_circle_radius(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(r, radius1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic3(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        // P1 = (x[i], y[i]), P2 = (x[i+1], y[i+1]), P3 = (x[i+2], y[i+2])
        // Check if P1 == P2 or P3 == P2
        if (realcompare(x[i], x[i + 1]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i], y[i + 1]) == "EQ")
            || (realcompare(x[i + 2], x[i + 1]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i + 2], y[i + 1]) == "EQ")
        {
            continue;
        }
        
        let v1x = x[i] - x[i + 1];
        let v1y = y[i] - y[i + 1];
        let v2x = x[i + 2] - x[i + 1];
        let v2y = y[i + 2] - y[i + 1];
        
        let dot = v1x * v2x + v1y * v2y;
        let mag1 = (v1x * v1x + v1y * v1y).sqrt();
        let mag2 = (v2x * v2x + v2y * v2y).sqrt();
        
        let cos_theta = (dot / (mag1 * mag2)).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);
        let theta = cos_theta.acos();
        
        if realcompare(theta, PI - epsilon) == "LT" || realcompare(theta, PI + epsilon) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic4(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], area1: f64) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 2 {
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic5(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], q_pts: usize, quads: usize) -> bool {
    for i in 0..=numpoints - q_pts {
        let mut quadrants = std::collections::HashSet::new();
        for j in 0..q_pts {
            quadrants.insert(quadrant(x[i + j], y[i + j]));
        }
        if quadrants.len() > quads {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic6(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64]) -> bool {
    for i in 0..numpoints - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == "LT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic7(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], n_pts: usize, dist_param: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - n_pts {
        let x1 = x[i];
        let y1 = y[i];
        let xn = x[i + n_pts - 1];
        let yn = y[i + n_pts - 1];
        
        if realcompare(x1, xn) == "EQ" && realcompare(y1, yn) == "EQ" {
            // First and last points are identical
            for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
                let d = dist(x1, y1, x[i + j], y[i + j]);
                if realcompare(d, dist_param) == "GT" {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        } else {
            // Distance from line
            let dx = xn - x1;
            let dy = yn - y1;
            let line_len = (dx * dx + dy * dy).sqrt();
            
            for j in 1..n_pts - 1 {
                let cross = (dx * (y[i + j] - y1) - dy * (x[i + j] - x1)).abs();
                let d = cross / line_len;
                if realcompare(d, dist_param) == "GT" {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic8(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = dist(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic9(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;
        let r = min_enclosing_circle_radius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(r, radius1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic10(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], c_pts: usize, d_pts: usize, epsilon: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - c_pts - d_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + c_pts + 1;
        let k = j + d_pts + 1;
        
        // Check if P1 == P2 or P3 == P2
        if (realcompare(x[i], x[j]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[i], y[j]) == "EQ")
            || (realcompare(x[k], x[j]) == "EQ" && realcompare(y[k], y[j]) == "EQ")
        {
            continue;
        }
        
        let v1x = x[i] - x[j];
        let v1y = y[i] - y[j];
        let v2x = x[k] - x[j];
        let v2y = y[k] - y[j];
        
        let dot = v1x * v2x + v1y * v2y;
        let mag1 = (v1x * v1x + v1y * v1y).sqrt();
        let mag2 = (v2x * v2x + v2y * v2y).sqrt();
        
        let cos_theta = (dot / (mag1 * mag2)).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);
        let theta = cos_theta.acos();
        
        if realcompare(theta, PI - epsilon) == "LT" || realcompare(theta, PI + epsilon) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic11(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == "GT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic12(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], g_pts: usize) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..=numpoints - g_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + g_pts + 1;
        if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == "LT" {
            return true;
        }
    }
    false
}

fn lic13(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], k_pts: usize, length1: f64, length2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 3 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut part1 = false;
    let mut part2 = false;
    for i in 0..=numpoints - k_pts - 2 {
        let j = i + k_pts + 1;
        let d = dist(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
        if realcompare(d, length1) == "GT" {
            part1 = true;
        }
        if realcompare(d, length2) == "LT" {
            part2 = true;
        }
    }
    part1 && part2
}

fn lic14(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], a_pts: usize, b_pts: usize, radius1: f64, radius2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut part1 = false;
    let mut part2 = false;
    for i in 0..=numpoints - a_pts - b_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + a_pts + 1;
        let k = j + b_pts + 1;
        let r = min_enclosing_circle_radius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(r, radius1) == "GT" {
            part1 = true;
        }
        if realcompare(r, radius2) != "GT" {
            part2 = true;
        }
    }
    part1 && part2
}

fn lic15(numpoints: usize, x: &[f64], y: &[f64], e_pts: usize, f_pts: usize, area1: f64, area2: f64) -> bool {
    if numpoints < 5 {
        return false;
    }
    let mut part1 = false;
    let mut part2 = false;
    for i in 0..=numpoints - e_pts - f_pts - 3 {
        let j = i + e_pts + 1;
        let k = j + f_pts + 1;
        let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
        if realcompare(area, area1) == "GT" {
            part1 = true;
        }
        if realcompare(area, area2) == "LT" {
            part2 = true;
        }
    }
    part1 && part2
}

fn compute_cmv(input: &Input) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = input.numpoints;
    let p = &input.parameters;
    vec![
        lic1(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.LENGTH1),
        lic2(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.RADIUS1),
        lic3(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.EPSILON),
        lic4(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.AREA1),
        lic5(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.Q_PTS, p.QUADS),
        lic6(n, &input.x),
        lic7(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.N_PTS, p.DIST),
        lic8(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.K_PTS, p.LENGTH1),
        lic9(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.A_PTS, p.B_PTS, p.RADIUS1),
        lic10(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.C_PTS, p.D_PTS, p.EPSILON),
        lic11(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.E_PTS, p.F_PTS, p.AREA1),
        lic12(n, &input.x, p.G_PTS),
        lic13(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.K_PTS, p.LENGTH1, p.LENGTH2),
        lic14(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.A_PTS, p.B_PTS, p.RADIUS1, p.RADIUS2),
        lic15(n, &input.x, &input.y, p.E_PTS, p.F_PTS, p.AREA1, p.AREA2),
    ]
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> Vec<Vec<bool>> {
    let mut pum = vec![vec![true; 15]; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        pum[i][i] = pum_diag[i];
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i == j {
                continue;
            }
            match lcm[i][j].as_str() {
                "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                _ => panic!("Unknown LCM value: {}", lcm[i][j]),
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[Vec<bool>]) -> Vec<bool> {
    let mut fuv = vec![false; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let all_true = pum[i].iter().all(|&x| x);
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&x| x)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str).unwrap();
    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).unwrap();
    
    let cmv = compute_cmv(&input);
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);
    
    let output = Output { cmv, pum, fuv, launch };
    println!("{}", serde_json::to_string(&output).unwrap());
}
```

use std::io::{self, Read};

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

const LT: &str = "LT";
const EQ: &str = "EQ";
const GT: &str = "GT";

fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return "EQ";
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        "GT"
    } else if diff < -eps {
        "LT"
    } else {
        "EQ"
    }
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Input {
    numpoints: usize,
    x: Vec<f64>,
    y: Vec<f64>,
    parameters: Parameters,
    lcm: Vec<Vec<String>>,
    pum_diag: Vec<bool>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Parameters {
    LENGTH1: f64,
    RADIUS1: f64,
    EPSILON: f64,
    AREA1: f64,
    Q_PTS: usize,
    QUADS: usize,
    DIST: f64,
    N_PTS: usize,
    K_PTS: usize,
    A_PTS: usize,
    B_PTS: usize,
    C_PTS: usize,
    D_PTS: usize,
    E_PTS: usize,
    F_PTS: usize,
    G_PTS: usize,
    LENGTH2: f64,
    RADIUS2: f64,
    AREA2: f64,
}

#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
struct Output {
    cmv: Vec<bool>,
    pum: Vec<Vec<bool>>,
    fuv: Vec<bool>,
    launch: bool,
}

fn dist(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)) / 2.0).abs()
}

fn circumradius(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    let a = dist(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    let b = dist(x2, y2, x3, y3);
    let c = dist(x3, y3, x1, y1);
    let area = triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3);
    if realcompare(area, 0.0) == EQ {
        f64::MAX
    } else {
        (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area)
    }
}

fn angle_at_vertex(
    x1: f64, y1: f64,
    x2: f64, y2: f64,
    x3: f64, y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    if realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    if realcompare(x3, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y3, y2) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;
    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let mag1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let mag2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();
    if realcompare(mag1, 0.0) == EQ || realcompare(mag2, 0.0) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    let cos_val = (dot / (mag1 * mag2)).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);
    Some(cos_val.acos())
}

fn quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if realcompare(x, 0.0) == GT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        2
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == LT {
        3
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == GT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        2
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == LT {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(
    px: f64, py: f64,
    x1: f64, y1: f64,
    x2: f64, y2: f64,
) -> f64 {
    let dx = x2 - x1;
    let dy = y2 - y1;
    let len_sq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
    if realcompare(len_sq, 0.0) == EQ {
        return dist(px, py, x1, y1);
    }
    let cross = ((px - x1) * dy - (py - y1) * dx).abs();
    cross / len_sq.sqrt()
}

fn eval_lics(input: &Input) -> Vec<bool> {
    let n = input.numpoints;
    let x = &input.x;
    let y = &input.y;
    let p = &input.parameters;
    let mut cmv = vec![false; 15];

    // LIC 1: two consecutive points distance > LENGTH1
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(dist(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1]), p.LENGTH1) == GT {
            cmv[0] = true;
            break;
        }
    }

    // LIC 2: three consecutive points not all within circle of radius RADIUS1
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        let r = circumradius(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]);
        if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == GT {
            cmv[1] = true;
            break;
        }
    }

    // LIC 3: three consecutive points angle outside (PI - EPSILON, PI + EPSILON)
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]) {
            if realcompare(angle, PI - p.EPSILON) == LT || realcompare(angle, PI + p.EPSILON) == GT {
                cmv[2] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 4: three consecutive points triangle area > AREA1
    for i in 0..n - 2 {
        if realcompare(triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[i + 1], y[i + 1], x[i + 2], y[i + 2]), p.AREA1) == GT {
            cmv[3] = true;
            break;
        }
    }

    // LIC 5: Q_PTS consecutive points in more than QUADS quadrants
    if p.Q_PTS >= 2 && p.Q_PTS <= n {
        for i in 0..=n - p.Q_PTS {
            let mut quads = std::collections::HashSet::new();
            for j in i..i + p.Q_PTS {
                quads.insert(quadrant(x[j], y[j]));
            }
            if quads.len() > p.QUADS {
                cmv[4] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 6: two consecutive points where X[j] - X[i] < 0 (j = i+1)
    for i in 0..n - 1 {
        if realcompare(x[i + 1] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
            cmv[5] = true;
            break;
        }
    }

    // LIC 7: N_PTS consecutive points, one point distance > DIST from line joining first and last
    if n >= 3 && p.N_PTS >= 3 && p.N_PTS <= n {
        for i in 0..=n - p.N_PTS {
            let first_x = x[i];
            let first_y = y[i];
            let last_x = x[i + p.N_PTS - 1];
            let last_y = y[i + p.N_PTS - 1];
            for k in i..i + p.N_PTS {
                let d = point_to_line_distance(x[k], y[k], first_x, first_y, last_x, last_y);
                if realcompare(d, p.DIST) == GT {
                    cmv[6] = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if cmv[6] {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 8: two points separated by exactly K_PTS intervening points, distance > LENGTH1
    if n >= 3 && p.K_PTS >= 1 && p.K_PTS <= n - 2 {
        for i in 0..n - 1 - p.K_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.K_PTS;
            if realcompare(dist(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]), p.LENGTH1) == GT {
                cmv[7] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 9: three points separated by A_PTS and B_PTS intervening points, not within circle of RADIUS1
    if n >= 5 && p.A_PTS >= 1 && p.B_PTS >= 1 && p.A_PTS + p.B_PTS <= n - 3 {
        for i in 0..n - 2 - p.A_PTS - p.B_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.A_PTS;
            let k = j + 1 + p.B_PTS;
            let r = circumradius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == GT {
                cmv[8] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 10: three points separated by C_PTS and D_PTS intervening points, angle outside range
    if n >= 5 && p.C_PTS >= 1 && p.D_PTS >= 1 && p.C_PTS + p.D_PTS <= n - 3 {
        for i in 0..n - 2 - p.C_PTS - p.D_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.C_PTS;
            let k = j + 1 + p.D_PTS;
            if let Some(angle) = angle_at_vertex(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]) {
                if realcompare(angle, PI - p.EPSILON) == LT || realcompare(angle, PI + p.EPSILON) == GT {
                    cmv[9] = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 11: three points separated by E_PTS and F_PTS intervening points, area > AREA1
    if n >= 5 && p.E_PTS >= 1 && p.F_PTS >= 1 && p.E_PTS + p.F_PTS <= n - 3 {
        for i in 0..n - 2 - p.E_PTS - p.F_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.E_PTS;
            let k = j + 1 + p.F_PTS;
            if realcompare(triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]), p.AREA1) == GT {

                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 12: two points separated by G_PTS intervening points, X[j] - X[i] < 0
    if n >= 3 && p.G_PTS >= 1 && p.G_PTS <= n - 2 {
        for i in 0..n - 1 - p.G_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.G_PTS;
            if realcompare(x[j] - x[i], 0.0) == LT {
                cmv[11] = true;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    // LIC 13: two parts: (a) distance > LENGTH1 and (b) distance < LENGTH2, both with K_PTS separation
    if n >= 3 && p.K_PTS >= 1 && p.K_PTS <= n - 2 {
        let mut part_a = false;
        let mut part_b = false;
        for i in 0..n - 1 - p.K_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.K_PTS;
            let d = dist(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j]);
            if realcompare(d, p.LENGTH1) == GT {

            if realcompare(d, p.LENGTH2) == LT {

        }

    if n >= 5 && p.A_PTS >= 1 && p.B_PTS >= 1 && p.A_PTS + p.B_PTS <= n - 3 {
        let mut part_a = false;
        let mut part_b = false;
        for i in 0..n - 2 - p.A_PTS - p.B_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.A_PTS;
            let k = j + 1 + p.B_PTS;
            let r = circumradius(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS1) == GT {

            if realcompare(r, p.RADIUS2) != GT {

    }

    // LIC 15: two parts: (a) area > AREA1 and (b) area < AREA2, both with E_PTS, F_PTS separation
    if n >= 5 && p.E_PTS >= 1 && p.F_PTS >= 1 && p.E_PTS + p.F_PTS <= n - 3 {
        let mut part_a = false;
        let mut part_b = false;
        for i in 0..n - 2 - p.E_PTS - p.F_PTS {
            let j = i + 1 + p.E_PTS;
            let k = j + 1 + p.F_PTS;
            let area = triangle_area(x[i], y[i], x[j], y[j], x[k], y[k]);
            if realcompare(area, p.AREA1) == GT {

            }
            if realcompare(area, p.AREA2) == LT {
                part_b = true;
            }
        }
        if part_a && part_b {
            cmv[14] = true;
        }
    }

    cmv
}

fn compute_pum(cmv: &[bool; 15], lcm: &[Vec<String>], pum_diag: &[bool]) -> [[bool; 15]; 15] {
    let mut pum = [[false; 15]; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        for j in 0..15 {
            if i == j {
                pum[i][j] = pum_diag[i];
            } else {
                let connector = &lcm[i][j];
                match connector.as_str() {
                    "NOTUSED" => pum[i][j] = true,
                    "ANDD" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] && cmv[j],
                    "ORR" => pum[i][j] = cmv[i] || cmv[j],
                    _ => pum[i][j] = true,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pum
}

fn compute_fuv(pum: &[[bool; 15]; 15]) -> [bool; 15] {
    let mut fuv = [false; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let mut all_true = true;
            for j in 0..15 {
                if !pum[i][j] {
                    all_true = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool; 15]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = eval_lics(input);
    let cmv_arr: [bool; 15] = cmv.clone().try_into().unwrap();
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv_arr, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum: pum.iter().map(|row| row.to_vec()).collect(),
        fuv: fuv.to_vec(),
        launch,
    }
}

    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).unwrap();
    let output = decide(&input);
    println!("{}", serde_json::to_string(&output).unwrap());
}

const PI: f64 = 3.1415926535;

const LT: &str = "LT";

fn realcompare(a: f64, b: f64) -> &'static str {
    let scale = a.abs().max(b.abs());
    if scale == 0.0 {
        return "EQ";
    }
    let eps = 0.5e-5 * scale;
    let diff = a - b;
    if diff > eps {
        "GT"
    } else if diff < -eps {
        "LT"
    } else {
        "EQ"
    }
}

fn dist(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x2 - x1).powi(2) + (y2 - y1).powi(2)).sqrt()
}

fn triangle_area(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    ((x1 * (y2 - y3) + x2 * (y3 - y1) + x3 * (y1 - y2)) / 2.0).abs()
}

fn circumradius(x1: f64, y1: f64, x2: f64, y2: f64, x3: f64, y3: f64) -> f64 {
    let a = dist(x1, y1, x2, y2);
    let b = dist(x2, y2, x3, y3);
    let c = dist(x3, y3, x1, y1);
    let area = triangle_area(x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3);
    if realcompare(area, 0.0) == EQ {
        f64::MAX
    } else {
        (a * b * c) / (4.0 * area)
    }
}

fn angle_at_vertex(
    x1: f64, y1: f64,
    x2: f64, y2: f64,
    x3: f64, y3: f64,
) -> Option<f64> {
    if realcompare(x1, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y1, y2) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    if realcompare(x3, x2) == EQ && realcompare(y3, y2) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    let dx1 = x1 - x2;
    let dy1 = y1 - y2;
    let dx2 = x3 - x2;
    let dy2 = y3 - y2;
    let dot = dx1 * dx2 + dy1 * dy2;
    let mag1 = (dx1 * dx1 + dy1 * dy1).sqrt();
    let mag2 = (dx2 * dx2 + dy2 * dy2).sqrt();
    if realcompare(mag1, 0.0) == EQ || realcompare(mag2, 0.0) == EQ {
        return None;
    }
    let cos_val = (dot / (mag1 * mag2)).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);
    Some(cos_val.acos())
}

fn quadrant(x: f64, y: f64) -> usize {
    if realcompare(x, 0.0) == GT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == EQ {
        2
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == EQ && realcompare(y, 0.0) == LT {
        3
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == GT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        1
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == GT {
        2
    } else if realcompare(x, 0.0) == LT && realcompare(y, 0.0) == LT {
        3
    } else {
        4
    }
}

fn point_to_line_distance(
    px: f64, py: f64,
    x1: f64, y1: f64,
    x2: f64, y2: f64,
) -> f64 {
    let dx = x2 - x1;
    let dy = y2 - y1;
    let len_sq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
    if realcompare(len_sq, 0.0) == EQ {
        return dist(px, py, x1, y1);
    }
    let cross = ((px - x1) * dy - (py - y1) * dx).abs();
    cross / len_sq.sqrt()
}

fn eval_lics(input: &Input) -> Vec<bool> {

    let mut fuv = [false; 15];
    for i in 0..15 {
        if !pum[i][i] {
            fuv[i] = true;
        } else {
            let mut all_true = true;
            for j in 0..15 {
                if !pum[i][j] {
                    all_true = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            fuv[i] = all_true;
        }
    }
    fuv
}

fn compute_launch(fuv: &[bool; 15]) -> bool {
    fuv.iter().all(|&v| v)
}

fn decide(input: &Input) -> Output {
    let cmv = eval_lics(input);
    let cmv_arr: [bool; 15] = cmv.clone().try_into().unwrap();
    let pum = compute_pum(&cmv_arr, &input.lcm, &input.pum_diag);
    let fuv = compute_fuv(&pum);
    let launch = compute_launch(&fuv);

    Output {
        cmv,
        pum: pum.iter().map(|row| row.to_vec()).collect(),
        fuv: fuv.to_vec(),
        launch,
    }
}

fn main() {
    let mut input_str = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input_str).unwrap();
    let input: Input = serde_json::from_str(&input_str).unwrap();
    let output = decide(&input);
    println!("{}", serde_json::to_string(&output).unwrap());
}
